specific_question: Which type of IT requests generates the most service desk emails monthly, across all of Lee Market stores in all regions?
answer: According to Lee’s Market’s internal IT tracking for Q3 2025, inventory system access requests make up 35% of monthly service desk emails. Knowing this highlights where catalog consolidation or workflow improvements could reduce repeated emails and speed resolution.
dr_question: Lee's Market is getting a high number of service desk emails across our stores, so how could we reduce the number of these emails by Q2 2026?
